name: Bowsette
description:
+UPDATE: Added Proxy. Tried to fix a common issue where she just grows a penis out of nowhere.

Fellas, for ages now a question has been up in the air. Is it gay to smash the turtle, if he has boobs? I will not be answering this question, but I will be smashing the turtle regardless. This is for all you people who just want a woman who will just kill you.
creator: heehookatie
